Cybersecurity Assessment
Answer Yes or No to each question. Be honest — your results are confidential.
0 of 21 answered 0%
🔐 Passwords & Access
1.Do all employees use strong, unique passwords for every work account?
2.Is multi-factor authentication (MFA) enabled on all business accounts (email, banking, software)?
3.Do you have a process to immediately remove access when an employee leaves?
4.Does your business use a password manager?
💻 Devices & Networks
5.Are all company computers and devices protected with up-to-date antivirus software?
6.Do all devices receive automatic security updates and patches?
7.Is your business Wi-Fi network password-protected and separate from your guest network?
8.Do employees working remotely connect through a secure VPN?
💾 Data & Backups
9.Is your business data backed up regularly (at least once a week)?
10.Are your backups stored in a separate, secure location (not just on the same device)?
11.Have you tested your backups to confirm they can actually be restored?
12.Is sensitive customer or financial data encrypted?
📧 Email & Phishing
13.Do your employees know how to recognize a phishing email?
14.Has your team received cybersecurity awareness training in the last 12 months?
15.Do you have email filtering in place to block spam and malicious messages?
📋 Policies & Planning
16.Does your business have a written cybersecurity policy?
17.Do you have an incident response plan in case of a cyberattack?
18.Do you know which vendor or professional to call if you get hacked right now?
19.Have you reviewed the cybersecurity practices of your third-party vendors and software providers?
🛡️ Compliance & Insurance
20.Does your business carry cyber liability insurance?
21.Are you aware of the data privacy regulations that apply to your industry?
